title: Agent Run Loop (Streamed)
interaction_flow: Runner → Caller: return RunResultStreaming (stream not yet consumed)
Caller → RunResultStreaming: async for event in stream_events()
start_streaming → RunState: create(context, original_input, starting_agent, max_turns) [if no run_state]
start_streaming: [turn 1] schedule parallel input guardrails as asyncio.Task
start_streaming → start_streaming: increment current_turn; start turn_span
start_streaming → run_single_turn_streamed(streamed_result, bindings, hooks, all_tools, server_conversation_tracker, ...) → SingleStepResult
run_single_turn_streamed → hooks: on_llm_start(context_wrapper, agent, instructions, input) [parallel]
run_single_turn_streamed → Session: save_result_to_session(input_items, [], state) [if not yet persisted]
run_single_turn_streamed → Model: stream_response(instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, ...) via stream_response_with_retry
Model → run_single_turn_streamed: async stream of response events
run_single_turn_streamed: on ResponseCompletedEvent → build final_response = ModelResponse
run_single_turn_streamed → get_single_step_result_from_response(bindings, input, pre_step_items, final_response, tools, handoffs, ...) → SingleStepResult
run_single_turn_streamed → stream_step_result_to_queue(filtered_result, _event_queue): emits RunItemStreamEvents for message_output, tool_output, handoff_requested, handoff_occured
--- back in start_streaming: branch on next_step ---
start_streaming: [if cancel_mode=after_turn] → put QueueCompleteSentinel, break; else continue loop
start_streaming → _finalize_streamed_interruption(streamed_result, save_items, items, response_id, interruptions, processed_response)
RunResultStreaming: on QueueCompleteSentinel → await input_guardrails_task; _check_errors(); break iterator
Caller: if result.interruptions → state = result.to_state(); state.approve(interruption); Runner.run_streamed(agent, state)
key_relationships: Runner creates RunResultStreaming and spawns start_streaming as asyncio.Task (run_loop_task)
RunResultStreaming.stream_events() dequeues from _event_queue and yields to caller
run_single_turn_streamed calls Model.stream_response() for LLM streaming
run_single_turn_streamed calls get_single_step_result_from_response after stream completes (tool execution, response parsing)
_finalize_streamed_final_output runs output guardrails then signals completion via QueueCompleteSentinel
_finalize_streamed_interruption saves items and signals interruption via QueueCompleteSentinel
_save_stream_items delegates to save_result_to_session for Session persistence
RunResultStreaming.to_state() creates RunState for resumption after interruption
event_types_emitted: RawResponsesStreamEvent - every raw LLM response event token-by-token
RunItemStreamEvent(name='tool_called') - function/MCP tool call item done
QueueCompleteSentinel - signals end of stream (internal, not yielded to caller)

next_step_outcomes.NextStepRunAgain: save items, continue loop (tool turn, more LLM calls needed)
next_step_outcomes.NextStepHandoff: save items, switch agent, emit AgentUpdatedStreamEvent, continue loop
next_step_outcomes.NextStepFinalOutput: run output guardrails, set final_output, is_complete=True, emit QueueCompleteSentinel, break
next_step_outcomes.NextStepInterruption: save items, set interruptions list, emit QueueCompleteSentinel, break (awaiting approval)

cancellation_modes.immediate: cancel all tasks, clear queues, is_complete=True, emit QueueCompleteSentinel
cancellation_modes.after_turn: set _cancel_mode flag; loop exits after current turn completes before starting next

guardrail_execution.input_sequential: run blocking before turn 1 LLM call; tripwire raises InputGuardrailTripwireTriggered
guardrail_execution.input_parallel: asyncio.Task launched concurrently with LLM stream; results checked via _input_guardrail_queue

session_persistence._save_stream_items: called after each completed turn step (RunAgain, Handoff, FinalOutput, Interruption)
session_persistence.save_result_to_session: underlying helper writing to Session store
session_persistence._current_turn_persisted_item_count: tracks how many items already persisted in current turn
session_persistence.input_persistence: input items saved once before first LLM call via save_result_to_session

important_notes: start_streaming runs as a background asyncio.Task; stream_events() is the consumer that dequeues events. The run is NOT complete until stream_events() iterator exits. Interruptions expose pending ToolApprovalItem objects on RunResultStreaming.interruptions after stream ends. is_complete flag is set to True in: _finalize_streamed_final_output, _finalize_streamed_interruption, cancel(immediate), and the start_streaming else/except clauses. RunResultStreaming.to_state() serializes current run state into RunState for resumption.

key_classes.RunResultStreaming: dataclass holding _event_queue (asyncio.Queue), run_loop_task, is_complete, final_output, current_agent, interruptions; provides stream_events(), cancel(), to_state()
key_classes.SingleStepResult: returned by run_single_turn_streamed; has next_step, new_step_items, pre_step_items, model_response, original_input, processed_response
key_classes.QueueCompleteSentinel: sentinel object put in _event_queue to signal stream completion
